# Chor Ratchawat Muay Thai Gym

> Family-run Muay Thai training camp in Koh Samui, Thailand. Two camps (Bo Phut and Plai Laem). Rated 5.0 out of 5 on Google with 400+ verified reviews. Open Monday to Saturday since 2020.

## About
Chor Ratchawat (ช.รัชวาทย์) is a family-run Muay Thai camp founded in 2020 by Kru Ratchawat. Ten Thai trainers teach group classes, private 1-on-1 sessions, kids classes (ages 8-13, plus 3-7 in private), and a structured fighter program. Open six days a week, closed Sunday for training. Group classes run 9:00 to 10:30 and 17:00 to 18:30. Private sessions are 60-minute slots between 7:00 and 17:00. The fighter program runs at Plai Laem only.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/): Overview of the camp, programs, and team
- [About](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/about): Story, philosophy, and trainers
- [Programs](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs): All training programs
- [Group Classes (Adults)](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/group-adults): Daily group Muay Thai sessions
- [Private Training](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/private): 1-on-1 personal sessions
- [Kids Muay Thai](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/group-kids): Group classes ages 8-13, private for younger
- [Fighter Training](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs/fighter): Competitive fighter preparation at Plai Laem
- [Bo Phut Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/bo-phut): Intimate street gym in Fisherman's Village
- [Plai Laem Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/plai-laem): Larger facility near Big Buddha
- [Pricing](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/pricing): All training packages from 400 THB drop-in
- [Booking](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/booking): Book and pay online
- [Accommodation](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/accommodation): Rooms and bungalow at Plai Laem camp
- [DTV Visa](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/visa/dtv): 6-month Destination Thailand Visa support
- [Team](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/team): Our ten Thai trainers
- [Reviews](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/reviews): Verified Google reviews
- [FAQ](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/faq): Common questions about training, prices, and visas
- [Contact](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/contact): Phone, email, maps, directions
